message:
fix: scope leaderboard to current year to match console rewards (#1503)

* feat: add contributor hover card on leaderboard usernames

Show a compact preview card when hovering over a contributor's name on
the leaderboard table. The card lazy-fetches the contributor's profile
JSON (cached in-memory) and shows: avatar, level, rank, points,
contribution cadence (streak, by-day heatmap, by-hour grid), activity
timeline sparkline, and a link to the full profile page.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* fix: scope leaderboard to current year to match console rewards

The leaderboard generator was fetching all-time data while the console
rewards handler scopes to the current calendar year. Add since parameter
to REST API calls and client-side created_at filtering. Update page text
to reflect current-year scope and add missing docs repo link.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
